name: Metro Cu
description_short: Metro Credit Union is a Massachusetts-based credit union serving Greater Boston with 220,000 members, offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking solutions.
description_long:
Metro Credit Union has been operating for 100 years and is headquartered in Chelsea, Massachusetts, serving the Greater Boston area. The credit union has grown to 220,000 members and positions itself as a community-focused financial institution committed to member success and local engagement through its foundation.

Metro offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including checking accounts with no minimum balance or monthly fees, savings accounts, student loan refinancing, home loans, home equity lines of credit, and various lending products. Members can access services through physical branches, digital banking via iBanking, a mobile app, a digital branch with live agents, and phone support via their virtual assistant Chelsea. The institution also partners with Greenlight to offer youth financial education tools and has launched a partnership with Members Plus to expand service offerings.

The company distinguishes itself through several competitive features: no-fee checking with rewards perks worth up to $1,200 annually, 24/7 virtual assistant support for after-hours banking, a digital branch for remote transactions, 100% FDIC deposit insurance, and recognition as the #1 credit union in the Boston area's 2025 "Best of" awards (second consecutive year). They also offer financial wellness resources, webinars, and personalized member support.

As a credit union, Metro operates on a member-owned cooperative model rather than shareholder profit maximization, which theoretically aligns incentives with member benefits. However, availability appears limited to the Greater Boston area, and the website does not provide detailed information on specific loan terms, rates, or eligibility requirements, which consumers would need for detailed comparison.
services: Checking accounts with no minimum balance or monthly fees
Mortgage lending and home purchase financing
Digital banking via iBanking platform and mobile app
Virtual assistant (Chelsea) for automated transactions and support
Digital branch for live agent support via web/mobile
Youth financial education via Greenlight debit card and app
Metro Rewards program with points toward cash back
Financial wellness webinars and educational resources
pros: No minimum balance and no monthly fee on checking accounts
Perks program worth up to $1,200 annually for members
24/7 virtual assistant (Chelsea) for after-hours banking transactions
Digital branch with live agent support during business hours via web/mobile
Voted #1 Credit Union in Boston area for 2025 (second consecutive year)
Comprehensive suite including checking, savings, loans, refinancing, and mortgages
cons: Limited geographic availability to Greater Boston area
Website does not disclose specific loan rates, APRs, or detailed terms for comparison
No information on minimum opening deposits or account funding requirements
Physical branch locations and hours not detailed on homepage
Limited transparency on eligibility requirements and lending criteria
best_for: Greater Boston area residents seeking full-service banking with competitive checking
Credit union members prioritizing community-focused banking and member advocacy
Consumers interested in student loan refinancing and home lending products
Families wanting youth financial education tools through Greenlight partnership
diagnosis: Metro Credit Union is best for residents of the Greater Boston area seeking full-service banking from a community-focused, member-owned institution with competitive checking rates and comprehensive lending products. The main caveat is that geographic availability is limited to Massachusetts, and detailed rate and term information is not provided on their website, requiring direct contact for loan comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
